texto: How do you tell a young girl in her formative years that the real value, real wealth is only in acquisition of knowledge through higher education? In caring for the downtrodden as well as the learned. In committing yourself to the matters of culture and creativity, when your own life has been complete antithesis of the same?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Vinod Pande que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “How do you tell a young girl in her formative years that the real value, real wealth is only in a…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre sabedoria, education, knowledge, com foco em knowledge e wisdom-quotes.

texto: Façade. One, simple word. But, very complex portents. It’s like living a life of half-dead. You are neither fully inside a grave, nor completely out of it, beyond the oppressive calmness of the slabs, tombstones and plaques. There is one solace though, you soon discover that you are not alone in the vast graveyard of the half-dead. This is what Kamini soon realized when she plunged herself back into the world that the destiny had conspired her to inherit.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Vinod Pande: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Façade. One, simple word. But, very complex portents. It’s like living a life of half-dead. You a…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, death-and-love, destiny pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e destiny.
